MARCFieldLabel: DATE/TIME AND PLACE OF AN EVENT (R)
DATE/TIME AND PLACE OF AN EVENT (R)
MARCSubfieldLabel: Geographic classification area code (R),Geographic classification subarea code (R)
Transformation Notes:
[Expression] → has place of capture → [Place] 
[Place] → has identifier of place/rdap:P70020 → [Nomen] 
[Nomen] → has nomen string/rdand:P80068 → ["$b value" + "$c value"]
[Nomen] → has scheme of nomen/rdano:P80069 → [Library of Congress Classification--Class G]
